history.details: v2.2 SDD docs archived to .sdd/archive-v2.2/. 108/108 tests green, 97% coverage. Baseline ready.
v2.3 SDD initiated by CEO. Scope: Go2 perception pipeline (SO-101 pattern). CEO decisions: Qwen VLM, MuJoCo-only.

spec.md drafted — 3 new Python modules (QwenVLMDetector, Go2Perception, Go2Calibration), 3 modifications (sim_tool, mobile_pick, skills/utils), no new ROS2 interfaces, no new deps. 10 ACs, 18+ test contracts, 7 Q&A defaults. Awaiting CEO approval.

Yusen approved spec with all 7 default decisions (Qwen2.5-VL-72B via OpenRouter, no tracker in v2.3, world-frame calibration, auto-detect retry, median+IQR denoise, log-only cost, 2-retry client). Proceeding to plan.

plan.md drafted — non-architectural. 10 sections: architecture / decisions / 3 new modules + 3 mods / data flow / dir structure / impl details (Qwen prompt, cost, calibration geom check, label helper) / 3-layer test strategy / 10 risks / 4-wave 8-task execution sketch / carry-forward debt. Zero new ROS2 interfaces, zero new deps.

task.md drafted — 6 code tasks (T1–T6) + 1 docs (T7) + 2 QA reviews. 3 waves code + 1 wave docs/QA. 30 new unit tests + 5 integration + 1 E2E dry-run = 36 targets. Peak parallelism 3 agents (W1). Full RED/GREEN/REFACTOR per task with explicit test names and verify commands. QA agent to review before dispatch.

First Wave 1 dispatch (3 parallel subagents) triggered OOM crash — each agent told to run full pytest regression, which auto-imports MuJoCo via pipeline.py. Three concurrent MuJoCo loads x 64GB RAM = OOM. All 3 agents' files lost before disk write. Updated feedback_no_parallel_agents.md memory with stricter rules: serial-only, subagents forbidden to run full pytest, only single-file scope.

Serial retry: Alpha T1 (vlm_qwen, f59c77e, 20 tests, 100% cov) → Beta T2 (go2_calibration, 3ac9d58, 8 tests, 100% cov) → Gamma T3 (go2_perception, 24ae9b1, 16 tests, ~95% cov via sys.settrace since pytest-cov conflicts with numpy 2.4 C extension). Wave 1 gate: 44/44 tests in 0.17s, ruff clean, memory stable 55G free.
Alpha T4 (sim_tool wire, a77a2c6, 5 integration tests) → Beta T5 (mobile_pick auto-detect + label_to_en_query, 2b67c6f, 9 + 5 new mobile_pick tests). Wave 2 gate: 80/80 in 0.23s.
Alpha T6 (verify_perception_pick.py E2E dry-run, 37f32e7). Exit 0 in <1s. Verified full chain: DetectSkill → world_model populate → MobilePickSkill auto-detect → pick succeeds.
T7 docs (1229acb) — v2.3 live REPL checklist (5 steps + diagnosis ladder), progress.md section, agents/devlog/status.md refresh. Done directly by dispatcher (tiny task, no subagent).

Parallel code-review (PASS-WITH-NITS) + security-review (PASS-WITH-LOW). Findings: 0 crit, 3 HIGH (2 fixed H1+H2, 1 deferred H3 = rename cross-module), 3 MAJOR (all fixed M1+M2+M3), 3 LOW (2 fixed L1+L2, 1 informational L3). Fix batch committed as b7a7c1b with 8 new test cases. Final: 88/88 green in 0.24s + E2E dry-run OK.
Completion report at .sdd/executive-briefs/v2.3-completion-report.md. Awaiting Yusen live-REPL smoke + final release approval.
